## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run release:verify` passes (tests + typecheck + build + smoke + doctor)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated docs/README if behavior or commands changed
- [ ] No `.bridge/` data, secrets, tokens, or personal/local paths committed
- [ ] Commit messages and comments are in English, no emojis
